description_long: This handcart features a rectangular wooden load platform constructed from parallel slats, bordered by raised side rails for added containment. Two large, spoked wooden wheels are mounted on either side near the rear, providing stability and ease of movement. At the front, a pair of straight, extended handles allow for manual pushing or pulling. The overall finish is a dark brown wood, giving it a classic, utilitarian appearance suitable for transporting goods in urban environments. The open slat design of the platform allows for airflow and reduces weight, while the side rails help prevent items from falling off during transit. The construction appears robust, with all visible components made primarily of wood.
description: A classic wooden handcart with a slatted load platform, raised side rails, two large spoked wheels, and dual straight handles for manual operation.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full slatted platform, parallel handles, and raised side rails.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large spoked wheel, the length of the handles, and the depth of the load platform.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the open end of the platform, the two handles, and the thickness of the side rails.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the other wheel and the overall symmetry of the cart.
